posts.text:
Mayor Mamdani’s wife has been cheering the murder of Jews for a decade online. It’s what she believes and she should have to answer for it herself. I discussed with @seanhannity:

Video

Miami of Ohio college kids break out the speedos to distract an SMU free throw shooter. And he missed the first one badly. Well done:

Video
I still haven’t recovered from that 2001 SEC title game. (There are a ton of Florida games that live in my nightmares as well).

I’ve got two: the LSU-Tennessee 2001 SEC title game — the Matt Mauck QB sneak game — & Tennessee at South Carolina 2022.


College Football Zone (@CollegeFBonX)

You can go back in time and change the outcome of one college football game. What game do you want to change?



— https://nitter.net/CollegeFBonX/status/2034443325307072918#m

This picture is a work of art. Most dangerous man ever pictured in argyle socks.


The Name of War (@TheNameofWar)

Secret Service agents responding to the Augusta National Golf Course incident where an armed man took hostages and demanded to speak to President Reagan, Oct. 23, 1983.





— https://nitter.net/TheNameofWar/status/2034328112888996019#m

This would be cool to make searchable for prominent accounts, would let you know when foreign actors are trying to rig American social media discussions. Credit @MattWalshBlog for posting this data and starting conversation.

Good data in profile section of verified accounts — you can see which country the likes on your account originate from. (I suspect many “popular” accounts are getting liked by foreign bots.) Here’s data on where my account’s likes come from over past three months.
Data here for those who want to see for themselves. Murder, sexual assault and car theft, in particular, have completely collapsed. mpdc.dc.gov/dailycrime

Washington, DC homicides are down 62% so far this year compared to last year at the same time. Remember when the media told us Trump’s surge of police support in DC would have no impact? DC is on pace to shatter the all time low for murders in the city.

Dan Patrick is a first ballot sports media hall of famer. Elite on TV and radio for decades. Phenomenal talent and work ethic.


Bobby Burack (@burackbobby_)

Column on Dan Patrick’s legacy as he approaches retirement, and how he adapted to the ever-changing media landscape better than most:

Link: outkick.com/analysis/dan-pat…





— https://nitter.net/burackbobby_/status/2034272397897953416#m

We hit a 125 year low for murder in the United States last year. Data from before 1900 isn’t great so it’s possible we hit the lowest murder rate in US history last year. Check out the graphic. Great news often gets limited attention. Thanks, President Trump. Graphic via @WSJ.
Congrats to Venezuela. Phenomenal series of games. US hitting vanished.

Absolutely. Fucking. Amazing. Moonshot.

Video
Bryce! That ball was obliterated! LFG!
Things are going so bad for the United States right now that Will Smith just swung at a pitch that actually hit him.
We hit the streets of Nashville to test SEC fans' geography knowledge
USA Baseball Repping USA Hockey!
Clay Travis is LOVING his new Tesla!
Auburn or Miami (OH)... Who Deserves To Make The Tournament
Who is the most overrated SEC team? 🤫⬇️
Iran Women's Soccer Players Risk Lives!
"Yet another big swing and a miss for San Francisco."
Trump Pledges Asylum To Iranian Women's Soccer Team
The Maxx Crosby Trade Doesn't Fix What's Broken in Baltimore
NFL Free Agency Chaos, Did The Ravens OVERREACH?! | OutKick the Show w/ Clay Travis
